title: Basic JavaScript Hoisting
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Hoisting. Focus on implementing Variable hoisting (var) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Hoisting
description: Create a function that uses Variable hoisting (var) and Function declaration hoisting together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Hoisting Project
description: Build a small application that applies Variable hoisting (var), Function declaration hoisting, Temporal Dead Zone (TDZ) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Hoisting
description: The following code has bugs related to Variable hoisting (var). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Hoisting
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Variable hoisting (var) and Function declaration hoisting.
